title: cyperus scabricaulis
intro: Cyperus scabricaulis, also known as the rough-stemmed sedge, is a plant species within the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to various parts of the world, including tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Cyperus scabricaulis include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Cyperus scabricaulis can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
